prompt: Create a simple RSI strategy: buy when RSI(14) is below 30, use 1 hour timeframe

generation.xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="control_forever" x="50" y="50">
    <statement name="DO">
      <block type="control_if">
        <value name="CONDITION">
          <block type="operator_less">
            <value name="LEFT">
              <block type="ta_rsi">
                <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                <mutation ma_period="14" applied_price="0"></mutation>
                <field name="NAME">RSI</field>
              </block>
            </value>
            <value name="RIGHT">
              <shadow type="math_number">
                <field name="NUM">30</field>
              </shadow>
            </value>
          </block>
        </value>
        <statement name="DO">
          <block type="trade_open">
            <field name="TRADE_ID">rsi_oversold_trade</field>
            <field name="DIRECTION">long</field>
            <value name="SIZE">
              <shadow type="math_number">
                <field name="NUM">0.1</field>
              </shadow>
            </value>
            <field name="LEVERAGE">1</field>
            <field name="ORDER_TYPE">market</field>
            <next>
              <block type="trade_stop_loss">
                <field name="CLOSE_TYPE">full</field>
                <field name="TRADE_ID">rsi_oversold_trade</field>
                <value name="PRICE">
                  <block type="operator_subtract">
                    <value name="LEFT">
                      <block type="trade_entry_price">
                        <field name="TRADE_ID">rsi_oversold_trade</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="RIGHT">
                      <block type="operator_multiply">
                        <value name="LEFT">
                          <block type="ta_atr">
                            <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                            <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                            <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                        <value name="RIGHT">
                          <shadow type="math_number">
                            <field name="NUM">1.5</field>
                          </shadow>
                        </value>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </value>
                <next>
                  <block type="trade_take_profit">
                    <field name="CLOSE_TYPE">full</field>
                    <field name="TRADE_ID">rsi_oversold_trade</field>
                    <value name="PRICE">
                      <block type="operator_add">
                        <value name="LEFT">
                          <block type="trade_entry_price">
                            <field name="TRADE_ID">rsi_oversold_trade</field>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                        <value name="RIGHT">
                          <block type="operator_multiply">
                            <value name="LEFT">
                              <block type="operator_multiply">
                                <value name="LEFT">
                                  <block type="ta_atr">
                                    <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                                    <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                                    <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                                  </block>
                                </value>
                                <value name="RIGHT">
                                  <shadow type="math_number">
                                    <field name="NUM">1.5</field>
                                  </shadow>
                                </value>
                              </block>
                            </value>
                            <value name="RIGHT">
                              <shadow type="math_number">
                                <field name="NUM">2</field>
                              </shadow>
                            </value>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </statement>
      </block>
    </statement>
  </block>
</xml>

prompt: Create a golden cross strategy: buy when SMA(10) crosses above SMA(20) on 1 hour timeframe

generation.xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="control_forever" x="50" y="50">
    <statement name="DO">
      <block type="control_if">
        <value name="CONDITION">
          <block type="environment_new_candle_open">
            <field name="TIMEFRAME">60</field>
          </block>
        </value>
        <statement name="DO">
          <block type="control_if">
            <value name="CONDITION">
              <block type="operator_and">
                <value name="LEFT">
                  <block type="operator_less">
                    <value name="LEFT">
                      <block type="environment_prev_candle_open">
                        <field name="TIMEFRAME">60</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="RIGHT">
                      <block type="ta_sma">
                        <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                        <mutation ma_period="10" shift="0" applied_price="0"></mutation>
                        <field name="NAME">Fast SMA</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </value>
                <value name="RIGHT">
                  <block type="operator_greater">
                    <value name="LEFT">
                      <block type="environment_prev_ticker_close">
                        <field name="TIMEFRAME">60</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="RIGHT">
                      <block type="ta_sma">
                        <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                        <mutation ma_period="10" shift="0" applied_price="0"></mutation>
                        <field name="NAME">Fast SMA</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </value>
              </block>
            </value>
            <statement name="DO">
              <block type="control_if">
                <value name="CONDITION">
                  <block type="operator_greater">
                    <value name="LEFT">
                      <block type="ta_sma">
                        <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                        <mutation ma_period="10" shift="0" applied_price="0"></mutation>
                        <field name="NAME">Fast SMA</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="RIGHT">
                      <block type="ta_sma">
                        <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                        <mutation ma_period="20" shift="0" applied_price="0"></mutation>
                        <field name="NAME">Slow SMA</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </value>
                <statement name="DO">
                  <block type="trade_close">
                    <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                    <next>
                      <block type="trade_open">
                        <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                        <field name="DIRECTION">long</field>
                        <value name="SIZE">
                          <shadow type="math_number">
                            <field name="NUM">0.1</field>
                          </shadow>
                        </value>
                        <field name="LEVERAGE">1</field>
                        <field name="ORDER_TYPE">market</field>
                        <next>
                          <block type="trade_modify_sl">
                            <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                            <value name="PRICE">
                              <block type="operator_subtract">
                                <value name="LEFT">
                                  <block type="trade_entry_price">
                                    <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                                  </block>
                                </value>
                                <value name="RIGHT">
                                  <block type="operator_multiply">
                                    <value name="LEFT">
                                      <block type="ta_atr">
                                        <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                                        <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                                        <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                                      </block>
                                    </value>
                                    <value name="RIGHT">
                                      <shadow type="math_number">
                                        <field name="NUM">2</field>
                                      </shadow>
                                    </value>
                                  </block>
                                </value>
                              </block>
                            </value>
                            <next>
                              <block type="trade_modify_tp">
                                <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                                <value name="PRICE">
                                  <block type="operator_add">
                                    <value name="LEFT">
                                      <block type="trade_entry_price">
                                        <field name="TRADE_ID">golden_cross_trade</field>
                                      </block>
                                    </value>
                                    <value name="RIGHT">
                                      <block type="operator_multiply">
                                        <value name="LEFT">
                                          <block type="operator_multiply">
                                            <value name="LEFT">
                                              <block type="ta_atr">
                                                <field name="PERIOD">60</field>
                                                <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                                                <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                                              </block>
                                            </value>
                                            <value name="RIGHT">
                                              <shadow type="math_number">
                                                <field name="NUM">2</field>
                                              </shadow>
                                            </value>
                                          </block>
                                        </value>
                                        <value name="RIGHT">
                                          <shadow type="math_number">
                                            <field name="NUM">3</field>
                                          </shadow>
                                        </value>
                                      </block>
                                    </value>
                                  </block>
                                </value>
                              </block>
                            </next>
                          </block>
                        </next>
                      </block>
                    </next>
                  </block>
                </statement>
              </block>
            </statement>
          </block>
        </statement>
      </block>
    </statement>
  </block>
</xml>

prompt: Buy every week on Monday, use daily timeframe

generation.xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="control_forever" x="50" y="50">
    <statement name="DO">
      <block type="control_if">
        <value name="CONDITION">
          <block type="operator_and">
            <value name="LEFT">
              <block type="environment_new_candle_open">
                <field name="TIMEFRAME">1440</field>
              </block>
            </value>
            <value name="RIGHT">
              <block type="operator_equals">
                <value name="LEFT">
                  <block type="environment_day_of_week"></block>
                </value>
                <value name="RIGHT">
                  <shadow type="math_number">
                    <field name="NUM">1</field>
                  </shadow>
                </value>
              </block>
            </value>
          </block>
        </value>
        <statement name="DO">
          <block type="trade_open">
            <field name="TRADE_ID">monday_buy_trade</field>
            <field name="DIRECTION">long</field>
            <value name="SIZE">
              <shadow type="math_number">
                <field name="NUM">0.1</field>
              </shadow>
            </value>
            <field name="LEVERAGE">1</field>
            <field name="ORDER_TYPE">market</field>
            <next>
              <block type="trade_stop_loss">
                <field name="CLOSE_TYPE">full</field>
                <field name="TRADE_ID">monday_buy_trade</field>
                <value name="PRICE">
                  <block type="operator_subtract">
                    <value name="LEFT">
                      <block type="trade_entry_price">
                        <field name="TRADE_ID">monday_buy_trade</field>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                    <value name="RIGHT">
                      <block type="operator_multiply">
                        <value name="LEFT">
                          <block type="ta_atr">
                            <field name="PERIOD">1440</field>
                            <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                            <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                        <value name="RIGHT">
                          <shadow type="math_number">
                            <field name="NUM">2</field>
                          </shadow>
                        </value>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </value>
                <next>
                  <block type="trade_take_profit">
                    <field name="CLOSE_TYPE">full</field>
                    <field name="TRADE_ID">monday_buy_trade</field>
                    <value name="PRICE">
                      <block type="operator_add">
                        <value name="LEFT">
                          <block type="trade_entry_price">
                            <field name="TRADE_ID">monday_buy_trade</field>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                        <value name="RIGHT">
                          <block type="operator_multiply">
                            <value name="LEFT">
                              <block type="ta_atr">
                                <field name="PERIOD">1440</field>
                                <mutation ma_period="14"></mutation>
                                <field name="NAME">ATR</field>
                              </block>
                            </value>
                            <value name="RIGHT">
                              <shadow type="math_number">
                                <field name="NUM">6</field>
                              </shadow>
                            </value>
                          </block>
                        </value>
                      </block>
                    </value>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </statement>
      </block>
    </statement>
  </block>
</xml>
